topics.name: GLP-1药物与肥胖治疗
topics.description: 关注GLP-1受体激动剂及多靶点肠促胰素药物在肥胖治疗、体重维持、体成分改善和心肾代谢结局中的疗效、安全性与作用机制。
topics.europe_pmc_query: (TITLE_ABS:"GLP-1 receptor agonist" OR TITLE_ABS:semaglutide OR TITLE_ABS:tirzepatide OR TITLE_ABS:liraglutide OR TITLE_ABS:retatrutide) AND (TITLE_ABS:obesity OR TITLE_ABS:"weight loss")

topics.name: 减重与代谢手术
topics.description: 关注袖状胃切除、Roux-en-Y胃旁路等减重代谢手术的适应证、围手术期管理、长期减重、体重反弹、代谢结局及术后机制。
topics.europe_pmc_query: (TITLE_ABS:"bariatric surgery" OR TITLE_ABS:"metabolic surgery" OR TITLE_ABS:"sleeve gastrectomy" OR TITLE_ABS:"Roux-en-Y gastric bypass") AND (TITLE_ABS:obesity OR TITLE_ABS:"weight loss" OR TITLE_ABS:"weight regain")

topics.name: 肠道菌群与肥胖
topics.description: 关注肠道菌群组成、菌源代谢物、肠屏障、胆汁酸、代谢性内毒素血症及其与脂肪组织炎症、胰岛素抵抗和肥胖表型的关系。
topics.europe_pmc_query: (TITLE_ABS:"gut microbiota" OR TITLE_ABS:"gut microbiome" OR TITLE_ABS:"microbial metabolites") AND (TITLE_ABS:obesity OR TITLE_ABS:"insulin resistance" OR TITLE_ABS:adipose)

topics.name: 咪唑丙酸介导的肥胖机制
topics.description: 关注肠道菌群来源咪唑丙酸在肥胖、脂肪组织功能障碍、胰岛素抵抗和代谢炎症中的作用及mTORC1、AMPK等分子机制。
topics.europe_pmc_query: (TITLE_ABS:"imidazole propionate" OR TITLE_ABS:"imidazole propionic acid") AND (TITLE_ABS:obesity OR TITLE_ABS:"insulin resistance" OR TITLE_ABS:adipose OR TITLE_ABS:metabolism)
